hooks.command: f=/Users/aine/work/three-house/.claude/active-drawing.txt; if [ -f "$f" ]; then tail -n +2 "$f" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:("[활성 도면 강제 고지] "+.)}}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/*.js) d=$(git -C /Users/aine/work/three-house diff -- "$f"); if echo "$d" | grep -q '\bcolor\b'; then echo "$d" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("색 변경 감지 — 전체 diff:\n"+.)}}'; else s=$(echo "$d" | diffstat -C 2>/dev/null || echo "$d" | head -3); echo "$s" | jq -Rs --arg f "$f" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:($f+" diffstat:\n"+.)}}'; fi ;; esac
